code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []

mut ti = 0
let tn = tokens.len()
while ti < tn
  match tokens.get(ti)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      if not list.contains(sorted, x)
        mut new_list: List<Int> = []
        mut inserted = false
        mut i = 0
        let n = list.len(sorted)
        while i < n
          match sorted.get(i)
          when Some(v)
            if not inserted and v > x
              new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
              inserted = true
            end
            new_list = list.push(new_list, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          i = i + 1
        end
        if not inserted
          new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
        end
        sorted = new_list
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  ti = ti + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut oi = 0
let on = list.len(sorted)
while oi < on
  match sorted.get(oi)
  when Some(v)
    if oi == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  oi = oi + 1
end
println(out)
